title: Shareholders Mourn Former Ibadan Shareholders Association Chairman, Abodunrin
description: The capital market community has been thrown into mourning following the death of Sir, Chief Sola Abodunrin, former Chairman of Ibadan Zone Shareholders Association, which sad event occurred on Sunday
html:
The capital market community has been thrown into mourning following the death of Sir, Chief Sola Abodunrin, former Chairman of Ibadan Zone Shareholders Association, which sad event occurred on Sunday August 22, 2021 after a protracted illness.

The late Abodunrin was an investor in the Nigerian capital market, where he played major roles towards the development of the market and an advocate of good corporate governance practice among listed companies.

Some of the shareholders that commented include the founder of Market Notifier, Ariyo Olugbosun, who said the market will greatly miss him.

For Olukoga William, “we lost a great man again, may his gentle soul rest in peace, may God be with his family, Amen”. Adagun Titilope, “may his gentle soul rest in perfect peace and may the lord be with the family he left behind”.

For Pa Olayemi, “I pray for his eternal rest, may God comfort his family”.Oyedele Taiwo, “death is inevitable may Allah be pleased with his soul, forgive and strengthen the family”
